partial_progress.details: CRITICAL: All 12 DensityFrameCondition sorries use exfalso in consistent contexts - proof structure itself is wrong. Sorries are NOT provable by contradiction. Added iteration skeleton to strictDensityAttempt. Created detailed handoff documenting required restructuring.

completion_data.completion_summary: Iteration 3: Deep analysis revealed fundamental structural issue - sorries use exfalso in consistent contexts where False is unprovable. The proof requires restructuring to replace `intro h_VM; exfalso; ...` with `by_cases h_VM` and explicit iteration in the positive case.

sorry_analysis.provability: sorries NOT provable with current structure

next_steps: REQUIRED: Restructure proof to avoid exfalso where hypotheses are consistent
Replace `intro h_VM; ...; sorry` with `by_cases h_VM : CanonicalR V M`
In positive case (V ~ M), implement fuel-based iteration to find strict witness
Implement termination proof via subformula measure
completion_data.blocking_insight: When M is reflexive and V ~ M (mutual accessibility), the goal False cannot be derived because the configuration is mathematically consistent
